#: DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE, USER SHOULD EDIT .vscode/settings.json INSTEAD

VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.label: $(rocket) Deploy
VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.tooltip: Deploy built binaries to the target device's ROS2 workspace

VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.label: $(notebook-delete-cell) Clean All
VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.tooltip: Clean build, install, and log directories on host

VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.label: $(run-above) Run LaunchFile
VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.tooltip: Launch the specified launch file from the specified package on the target device. Please ensure LAUNCH_PACKAGE_NAME and LAUNCH_FILE_NAME are configured correctly in settings.json

VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.label: $(run) Run ExecutableFile
VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.tooltip: Run the specified executable from the specified package on the target device. Please ensure NODE_PACKAGE_NAME and NODE_EXECUTABLE_NAME are configured correctly in settings.json

VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.label: $(cloud-download) Install Deps
VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.tooltip: Install runtime dependencies on the target board via rosdep (over SSH), using the deployed install/ workspace
